description: Crafted from 92% cotton and 8% spandex fabric, this medium coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with double layered moulded cups to prevent show through. The side shaper keeps the extra weight in check and provides a rounder contour. The pretty floral scallop lace at the dé colleté and straps makes you feel beautiful and, with a cut that offers exemplary comfort, this brassiere is perfect for the confident you. Ideal for support through the day.Made of breathable stretch cotton/spandex fabric for enhanced comfortDouble layered moulded cups with a side shaper and floral lace for perfect shaping and styleBeautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretchPrinted label for abrasion-free comfortWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
